response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics perfectly matched the song titles and composers, but reference lyrics contained typos and errors (e.g., 'オカトミシン' instead of 'オキシトシン・ドーパミン・セロトニン') which were manually corrected. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON scenes were utilized to find the song contexts, but manual transcription was heavily relied upon for the intro dialogue, Koyori's rapid song lyrics, and La+'s segment due to the brevity of the reference material. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were aligned strictly to vocal cord activation, using instantaneous transitions (Line 1 'e' matching Line 2 's') to avoid cascading delays during rapid speech and singing, and utilizing visual triggers for silent title cards.

subtitles.original: おめでとうございまーす！ / はい！
subtitles.english: Congratulations! / Yes!

subtitles.original: そして、本日は何やらライブだけではなく？
subtitles.english: And today, it seems there's not just a live performance?

subtitles.original: お？重要な？
subtitles.english: Oh? Important...?

subtitles.original: 情報がもりもりもりもり盛りだくさんらしいので！
subtitles.english: ...information is piled up high!

subtitles.original: もりもり盛りだくさん！
subtitles.english: Lots and lots of info!

subtitles.original: 皆さん、最後までちゃんと見ていくように！
subtitles.english: Everyone, make sure you watch until the very end!

subtitles.original: 途中退出禁止です！よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Leaving halfway is forbidden! Please treat us well!

subtitles.original: もりもりもり...森の字を作る
subtitles.english: Mori, mori... Let's make the kanji for forest (森)!

subtitles.original: 三人で？三人で森を作る？
subtitles.english: The three of us? The three of us make a forest?

subtitles.original: 混ぜるな！混ぜるな！
subtitles.english: Don't mix us in! Don't mix us in!

subtitles.original: ちょっと待ってください！何ですか何ですか？早くしないと！
subtitles.english: Wait a minute! What is this, what is this? We have to hurry!

subtitles.original: みんなに見せらんないから、ライブ！
subtitles.english: Or we won't be able to show everyone the live show!

subtitles.original: そうそう！早速...
subtitles.english: Yes, yes! Right away...

subtitles.original: 最初は...ドゥルドゥルドゥルドゥル...
subtitles.english: First up is... *drumroll*...

subtitles.original: こよちゃんのパートから！
subtitles.english: Koyori-chan's part!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: 何だそのポーズ！ / 可愛いでしょ！
subtitles.english: What is that pose?! / Isn't it cute?!

subtitles.original: ちょっと、ちょっと...可愛い！
subtitles.english: Wait, wait... It's cute!

subtitles.original: いってらっしゃーい！
subtitles.english: Have a good show!

subtitles.original: 頑張ってね！バイバーイ！
subtitles.english: Do your best! Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: 見てるよー！走って！そこ広いから！
subtitles.english: We're watching! Run! It's wide over there!

subtitles.original: 急かさないで！ / 邪魔だから行くよ
subtitles.english: Don't rush me! / You're in the way, so I'm going.

subtitles.original: え？俺たちも？ / 早く早く！早くして！
subtitles.english: What? Us too? / Hurry, hurry! Hurry up!

subtitles.original: 行くぜ！行くぜ！早く！
subtitles.english: Let's go! Let's go! Hurry!

subtitles.original: 爆ラブ+ケミストリー\n作詞・作曲・編曲：ナユタン星人
subtitles.english: [Title: Baku-Love + Chemistry\nLyrics/Composition/Arrangement: Nayutalien]

subtitles.original: ラブは気化センセーション 存在自体マジ勘違い
subtitles.english: Love is a vaporization sensation! The existence itself is a total misunderstanding!

subtitles.original: 調合は未完成 トキメキのケミカル
subtitles.english: The concoction is incomplete, heart-throbbing chemicals!

subtitles.original: え、なるほど？そんじゃこれならどうだかと
subtitles.english: Eh, I see? Well then, how about this?

subtitles.original: オキシトシン ドーパミン セロトニン
subtitles.english: Oxytocin, dopamine, serotonin!

subtitles.original: あわだつこのこの感情
subtitles.english: This bubbling emotion...

subtitles.original: 混ぜるほどにはまる はまる
subtitles.english: The more it mixes, the more I get hooked, hooked!

subtitles.original: 上昇のモーション
subtitles.english: Rising motion!

subtitles.original: 奇跡的に愛しくなれ
subtitles.english: Miraculously become lovely!

subtitles.original: フラスコにハート やべ、なにかあった
subtitles.english: A heart in a flask! Uh oh, something happened!

subtitles.original: 効果のてすと 君が1番！
subtitles.english: Testing the effect, you are number one!

subtitles.original: ほら ぼう ぼう ぼう 君に熱
subtitles.english: Look, burning, burning, burning, fever for you!

subtitles.original: ちょっと危険なまぜまぜ
subtitles.english: A slightly dangerous mix-mix!

subtitles.original: どっかーん！ケミストリーだ！
subtitles.english: Ka-boom! It's chemistry!

subtitles.original: あいまいな君とのプラトニック・ラブに
subtitles.english: In a platonic love with the ambiguous you,

subtitles.original: 平和っぽい恋のジェネリック
subtitles.english: A generic, peaceful love.

subtitles.original: もっと夢中になりたいな
subtitles.english: I want to get more obsessed with you!

subtitles.original: 急接近したい君の胸
subtitles.english: I want to get rapidly close to your chest,

subtitles.original: その前にシンクロプラクティス
subtitles.english: Before that, a synchro practice!

subtitles.original: 爆ラブ君とケミストリー
subtitles.english: Baku-Love chemistry with you!

subtitles.original: 今度はもっと甘い液
subtitles.english: This time, an even sweeter liquid!

subtitles.original: 解けるくらいドキドキするはず
subtitles.english: It should make your heart throb enough to melt!

subtitles.original: え、白い煙？はい、出たー！
subtitles.english: Eh, white smoke? Yes, here it comes!

subtitles.original: そっちのタイプのドキドキじゃない！
subtitles.english: That's not the "heart-throbbing" type!

subtitles.original: けど、まあある意味成功かな？
subtitles.english: But, well, in a way, is it a success?

subtitles.original: ラブは急展開 一秒待てない時間保存
subtitles.english: Love develops suddenly! A time that can't wait even a second!

subtitles.original: 調合は必殺 判定はどうでしょう？
subtitles.english: The concoction is a deadly blow! How is the judgment?

subtitles.original: え、どうして！？
subtitles.english: Eh, why!?

subtitles.original: 想定外の爆発を君と重ねてく 化学変化で
subtitles.english: Overlapping unexpected explosions with you, through chemical change!

subtitles.original: きゅっと冷まさせて二人のマージ
subtitles.english: Cooling down to merge the two of us!

subtitles.original: ラブのデシベル 君が一番！
subtitles.english: Decibel of love, you are number one!

subtitles.original: ほら ぼう ぼう ぼう 君に熱
subtitles.english: Look, burning, burning, burning, fever for you!

subtitles.original: 僕が君のアンチドート
subtitles.english: I am your antidote!

subtitles.original: どっかーん！ケミストリーだ！
subtitles.english: Ka-boom! It's chemistry!

subtitles.original: あいまいな君とのプラトニック・ラブに
subtitles.english: In a platonic love with the ambiguous you,

subtitles.original: 平和っぽい恋 of ジェネリック
subtitles.english: A generic, peaceful love.

subtitles.original: どんな毒も加速して
subtitles.english: Accelerating any poison...

subtitles.original: どっかーん！
subtitles.english: Ka-boom!

subtitles.original: 君プラスハート 解け合ってまぜまぜシナジー
subtitles.english: You plus heart! Melting and mixing synergy!

subtitles.original: 君こそが愛のアトミック
subtitles.english: You are the atomic force of love!

subtitles.original: もっと夢中になりたいな
subtitles.english: I want to get more obsessed with you!

subtitles.original: 急接近したい君の胸保存
subtitles.english: I want to get rapidly close to your chest,

subtitles.original: その前にシンクロプラクティス
subtitles.english: Before that, a synchro practice!

subtitles.original: 爆ラブ君と追検証！
subtitles.english: Baku-Love re-verification with you!

subtitles.original: きゅんとして僕の胸
subtitles.english: My chest tightening with love...

subtitles.original: その前にシンクロプラクティス
subtitles.english: Before that, a synchro practice!

subtitles.original: 爆ラブ君とケミストリー 実験は君と永遠なり！
subtitles.english: Baku-Love chemistry with you! The experiment with you is forever!

subtitles.original: Overtime\n作詞・作曲・編曲：jon-YAKITORY
subtitles.english: [Title: Overtime\nLyrics/Composition/Arrangement: jon-YAKITORY]

subtitles.original: 君が好きってこの感情に潰されてる
subtitles.english: I'm being crushed by this feeling of liking you.

subtitles.original: 足りないのはどちらの方かどうでもいいかも
subtitles.english: Which of us is lacking, maybe it doesn't matter.

subtitles.original: 傷ついたって知らないよね 責任の所在
subtitles.english: You don't care if I get hurt, where does the responsibility lie?
